headline: Trump’s Affordability Push Stalls Ahead of Midterm Elections
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The Trump administration’s fitful campaign to address US voters’ affordability concerns ahead of the midterm elections is faltering, with some key efforts stalled, cast aside or limited in scope.
